description: OpenAPI-generated TokenLab MCP server for models, native AI, multimodal media, tasks, and files.
name: io.github.hedging8563/tokenlab

environmentVariables.description: Optional TokenLab API base URL. Defaults to https://api.tokenlab.sh.
environmentVariables.name: TOKENLAB_API_BASE

environmentVariables.description: Optional TokenLab API key. Required for LLM inference, multimodal generation, async task, embedding, rerank, and translation tools.
environmentVariables.name: TOKENLAB_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional request timeout in milliseconds. Defaults to 120000.
environmentVariables.name: TOKENLAB_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS

environmentVariables.description: Optional generated tool profile: catalog, core (default), or full.
environmentVariables.name: TOKENLAB_MCP_TOOL_PROFILE

environmentVariables.description: Optional maximum local upload size per file. Defaults to 104857600 bytes.
environmentVariables.name: TOKENLAB_MCP_MAX_FILE_BYTES

environmentVariables.description: Optional maximum response size returned inline. Defaults to 2097152 bytes.
environmentVariables.name: TOKENLAB_MCP_INLINE_BYTES

environmentVariables.description: Optional local directory for response artifacts that are not returned inline.
environmentVariables.name: TOKENLAB_ARTIFACT_DIR

title: TokenLab MCP Server
